title: crotalaria laeta
intro: Crotalaria laeta, also known as the Yellow Bird Flower or Yellow Rattle, is a species of flowering plant in the pea family (Fabaceae). The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria laeta include the ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and flowers can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be administered to harness its medicinal properties.
